pool.baseline: sometimes i just stare at the ceiling and realize how much energy it takes just to exist. like, we spend all this time working, eating, sleeping, just to keep a biological machine running that doesn't even matter in the grand scheme of things. it feels like a glitch. why do we even bother trying to find meaning when the universe is just cold and empty? it feels so exhausting to keep pretending there's a point.
pool.message: sometimes i just stare at the ceiling and realize how much energy it takes just to exist. like, we spend all this time working, eating, sleeping, just to keep a biological machine running that doesn't even matter in the grand scheme of things. it feels like a glitch. why do we even bother trying to find meaning when the universe is just cold and empty? it feels so exhausting to keep pretending there's a point.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do this anymore. the wound in my side isnt stopping bleeding and it's so cold out here. everything just feels... heavy. i'm so tired of fighting for nothing.
pool.message: i dont think i can do this anymore. the wound in my side isnt stopping bleeding and it's so cold out here. everything just feels... heavy. i'm so tired of fighting for nothing.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i look at the bills and i just feel like this huge weight around their necks and it's all because of me.
pool.message: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i look at the bills and i just feel like this huge weight around their necks and it's all because of me.

pool.baseline: i dont even know who i am anymore. everything i worked for for twenty years is just... gone. the calls stopped, the meetings stopped, even my family looks at me like i'm a stranger. it feels like i died months ago and i'm just a ghost walking around. there's nothing left to go back to.

pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i never thought i'd actually hate how quiet it is. everything just feels... empty. like there's no point in even waking up tomorrow if it's just gonna be this same grey nothingness.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im playing a game where everyone else has the rulebook and im just guessing. it's so tiring pretending to be a person that actually fits in. i dont think i ever will.
pool.message: i just feel like im playing a game where everyone else has the rulebook and im just guessing. it's so tiring pretending to be a person that actually fits in. i dont think i ever will.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just empty now. everything i used to make, every song or painting... it just feels like noise. there's nothing left inside me to give and the world just keeps demanding more. it's like the light just went out and i'm just sitting here in the dark waiting for nothing.

pool.baseline: i dont know. i feel like i've tried everything and nothing changes. its just constant weight. like i'm just existing but not actually living. is it even worth it to keep pushing when everything just feels empty?
pool.message: i dont know. i feel like i've tried everything and nothing changes. its just constant weight. like i'm just existing but not actually living. is it even worth it to keep pushing when everything just feels empty?

pool.baseline: it just feels like i'm just taking up space lately. everything is so slow and hard, and i'm just waiting for my body to finally give out on me. it's exhausting.

pool.baseline: i rly dont know what to do anymore. i did everything i could for him but he still died... i feel like a total failure. i'm so tired of everything. i just want to sleep and not wake up.

pool.baseline: i dont even know how to keep going. the debt is just... it's everywhere. every time i think i'm making a dent i just sink deeper. it feels like i'm drowning and there's no way out. i just want it all to stop.

pool.baseline: i feel like i've just hit a wall. everything that's happened... it's just too much. i dont think there's anything left of me to fix. i'm just fundamentally broken at this point.

pool.baseline: i feel like i've been walking for so long. just through this thick, grey fog, following a path that doesn't even seem to lead anywhere anymore. i think i've finally reached the edge of the woods, and there's just nothing left ahead of me. it's so quiet here. i'm just... so tired of trying to find a way through.
